8:["$","p",null,{"children":"Activate the Hermes venv, install the package, then register:"}]
9:["$","$L25",null,{"code":"source ~/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/activate\n\n# If your venv was created with python -m venv or virtualenv\npip install mnemosyne-memory\n\n# If your venv was created with uv venv (pip is not included)\nuv pip install mnemosyne-memory\n\npython -m mnemosyne.install\n","language":"bash"}]
a:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L26",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["path",{"d":"m21.73 18-8-14a2 2 0 0 0-3.48 0l-8 14A2 2 0 0 0 4 21h16a2 2 0 0 0 1.73-3","key":"wmoenq"}],["path",{"d":"M12 9v4","key":"juzpu7"}],["path",{"d":"M12 17h.01","key":"p32p05"}]],"className":"lucide-triangle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"uv venv does not include pip"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["If you created the Hermes venv with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"uv venv"}],", running ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install"}]," will fail with \"command not found.\" This is by design — uv replaces pip with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"uv pip"}],". Always use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"uv pip install"}]," in uv-created environments."]}]}]]}]]}]}]
b:["$","p",null,{"children":["Or add to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes.yaml"}],":"]}]
c:["$","$L25",null,{"code":"plugins:\n- name: mnemosyne-memory\n  source: pip\n  config:\n    db_path: ./memory.db\n    embedding_model: text-embedding-3-small\n    auto_context: true\n    context_injection:\n      enabled: true\n      max_memories: 5\n      min_relevance: 0.7\n","language":"yaml"}]
d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Auto-Context Injection"}]
e:["$","p",null,{"children":"When enabled, Mnemosyne automatically injects relevant memories into agent context:"}]
f:["$","$L27",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  U[User Input] -->|query| M[Mnemosyne]\n  M -->|recall| C[Context Assembly]\n  C -->|inject| A[Agent Prompt]\n  A -->|respond| R[Response]\n  R -->|remember| M\n"}]
10:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Plugin Hooks"}]
11:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne registers the following Hermes hooks:"}]
12:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Hook"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Timing"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Action"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"pre_prompt"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Before LLM call"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Inject relevant memories"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"post_response"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"After LLM call"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Store conversation"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"tool_call"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"After tool execution"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Store tool results"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"shutdown"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Agent shutdown"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Run sleep consolidation"}]]}]]}]]}]
13:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Tool Schema"}]
14:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne exposes these tools to agents:"}]
15:["$","$L25",null,{"code":"{\n\"name\": \"mnemosyne_remember\",\n\"description\": \"Store information in long-term memory\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"content\": { \"type\": \"string\", \"description\": \"Information to store\" },\n  \"tags\": { \"type\": \"array\", \"items\": { \"type\": \"string\" } },\n  \"importance\": { \"type\": \"number\", \"minimum\": 0, \"maximum\": 1 }\n}\n}\n\n{\n\"name\": \"mnemosyne_recall\",\n\"description\": \"Retrieve relevant memories\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"query\": { \"type\": \"string\" },\n  \"top_k\": { \"type\": \"integer\", \"default\": 5 }\n}\n}\n\n{\n\"name\": \"mnemosyne_triple_add\",\n\"description\": \"Store a structured fact as a knowledge graph triple\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"subject\": { \"type\": \"string\" },\n  \"predicate\": { \"type\": \"string\" },\n  \"object\": { \"type\": \"string\" }\n}\n}\n\n{\n\"name\": \"mnemosyne_triple_query\",\n\"description\": \"Query the knowledge graph\",\n\"parameters\": {\n  \"subject\": { \"type\": \"string\" },\n  \"predicate\": { \"type\": \"string\" }\n}\n}\n","language":"json"}]

17:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Option"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"auto_context"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"true"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Inject memories into prompts"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"context_injection.max_memories"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"5"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Memories per injection"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"context_injection.min_relevance"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.7"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Minimum score to include"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"store_conversations"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"true"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Save conversation history"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"store_tool_results"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"true"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Save tool outputs"}]]}]]}]]}]

19:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Plugin not loading"}]
1a:["$","$L25",null,{"code":"hermes plugins list\n# Verify mnemosyne appears\n\nhermes mnemosyne stats\n# Check memory statistics\n","language":"bash"}]
